name: intdata-runtime
description: Инструменты runtime intData для host diagnostics, SSH, Firefox profiles, vault sanitize и runtime GC.

interface.shortDescription: Host, SSH, Firefox, vault и GC
interface.longDescription: Guarded MCP-инструменты runtime intData для host-preflight/bootstrap/recovery, резолва SSH, запуска dedicated Firefox MCP profiles, vault sanitize и runtime GC.
defaultPrompt: Проверить host readiness и SSH route.
